Welcome to FORTEXIM INTERNATIONAL
FORTEXIM INTERNATIONAL is a Lahore-Pakistan Based company. We have been in this line since 1994 and working with many top brands in Pakistan Like Hashoo Group , Serena Group , Bareeze , Avari ,Ramada ,Park-plaza ,Crown Plaza etc etc. We produce and market our products under the Brand “Regency.

The basic philosophy of our company is satisfaction of our customers regarding quality ,price and assurances . Although we are Producers & Exporters of all kinds of quality Terry Towels, Bedding and other related items but over the decades it has becoming luxury linen for star hotel industry . Our Products are mainly high ends in competition with Turkey , Brazil and Portugal.

We are producing BED , BATH ,F&B Linen and Uniforms in carded ,Combed , Egyptian ,Turkish and American Cotton and Pakistani Combed Cotton which is very much recommended for 4 and 5 stars at remarkable low prices.

Products Range
  • Towels 100% Cotton in all sizes
  • Bath Mat
  • Bath Robe
  • Bed Sheet White Plain, Stripe & jacquards in Percale , Mercerized ,Emption ,Combed and Carded Cotton.
  • Pillow Cover
  • Pillow Ball Fiber , Polyester & Duck Down
  • Prayer Mats
  • Twist Hair Towel for Ladies
  • Terry Slipper
  • Terry Gloves
  • Ihram Towel for Hajj & Umrah
